body:
## Summary
- fixes literal English calques in q176/q178 rights-work wording
- regenerates canonical CSV and static question bank so derived variants carry the natural wording
- adds validate:content coverage plus bilingual parity regression tests for the rights-work naturalness guard

## Validation
- npm run validate:content
- node --test tests/content-bilingual-text-parity.test.js
- node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check && node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check
- npm run typecheck -- --pretty false
- git diff --check

Note: node --test tests/content-published-question-types.test.js remains red on existing current-main fixture drift unrelated to this atom; the new focused bilingual parity test passes.
title: content: guard rights-work English naturalness
